visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle of water with a blue cap, located behind the red soda can.
A red soda can with white text, located in front of the clear water bottle.
A green soda can with white text, located to the left of the red soda can.
A brown paper bag behind all the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is directly in front of and blocking the clear water bottle.
The clear water bottle is now accessible after removing the obstacle.
